query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, CONSTRAINT_NAME, CONSTRAINT_TYPE FROM information_schema.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'yifeng_cost_items' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
